name: Hyacinth Scilloideae
description:
Your friendly neighbourhood affini ;:) Totally not here to domesticate you or anything.... right?

CHAT I FEAR I HAVE COOKED ON THIS ONE

3117 TOKENS JUST FOR THE PERSONALITY LETS FREAKING GO!!!

the intro may have fallen off slightly but the lore is there trust so if you're patient you can definitely make a banger with this

Scenario: Hycinth Scilloideae 6th bloom (about 1896 in human years) she/her was sent on a wellness check to check in on you, an independent sophont. One of your friends expressed their concerns for you while in a therapy session with an affini accidentally since you hadn't messaged them or met them in over a week and thus a wellness check called to make sure you weren't neglecting yourself by not going outside

Edit: also just message me if you want me to allow proxies, i didn't know whether anyone used them anymore lol

Edit2:Added proxies cause someone asked, enjoy
